'''Haskit''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] who was a [[Matriarch/Legends|matriarch]] and was able to influence her [[Species/Legends|species']] [[Combined Bothan Clans|government]] on the<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|II|24|Haskit}}</ref> Bothan [[Homeworld/Legends|home]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of<ref name="UAA">''[[Ultimate Alien Anthology]]''</ref> [[Bothawui/Legends|Bothawui]] for fifty [[Standard year/Legends|years]]. After her [[Death/Legends|death]], she was famous for the role she played in [[Politics/Legends|politics]],<ref name="CSWE" /> and there were female Bothans who were named after her.<ref name="GCG">''[[Galactic Campaign Guide]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Haskit was first mentioned in the ''[[Galactic Campaign Guide]]'', a [[2003]] sourcebook for [[Wizards of the Coast]]'s ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]'', written by [[Peter M. Schweighofer|Peter Schweighofer]] and [[J.D. Wiker]]. She was only described in a table of Bothan female names.<ref name="GCG" />
